title: React Components Assignment
description: Build and compose reusable React components using JSX. Focus on props, component structure, and basic styling.

title: Hooks and State Exercise
description: Practice using React hooks such as useState and useEffect to manage state and side effects in functional components.

title: Full Stack React Project
description: Develop a full-stack React application that integrates a frontend UI with a backend API and persistent data storage.

title: Problem Solving Worksheet
description: Solve a set of logic and algorithmic problems to strengthen structured problem-solving techniques.

title: Functions and Recursion Lab
description: Implement recursive functions and analyze their behavior, efficiency, and base cases.

title: Data Structures Practice
description: Practice working with fundamental data structures such as lists, trees, and maps through guided exercises.

title: Logic and Proofs Homework
description: Complete exercises involving propositional logic, predicates, and formal proofs.

title: Sets and Relations Assignment
description: Work with sets, relations, and functions, including proofs of properties such as transitivity and equivalence.

title: Graph Theory Problems
description: Solve graph theory problems involving paths, cycles, connectivity, and graph properties.

title: OOP Fundamentals Lab
description: Practice object-oriented programming concepts including classes, objects, encapsulation, and methods.

title: Inheritance and Polymorphism Exercise
description: Implement inheritance hierarchies and demonstrate polymorphic behavior in object-oriented programs.

title: Design Patterns Project
description: Apply common software design patterns to improve code structure, flexibility, and maintainability.

title: Data Structures Implementation
description: Implement core data structures from scratch and analyze their time and space complexity.

title: Algorithm Analysis Homework
description: Analyze algorithm performance using asymptotic notation and compare efficiency across approaches.

title: Graph Algorithms Assignment
description: Implement and analyze graph algorithms such as BFS, DFS, and shortest path algorithms.

title: Agile Process Reflection
description: Write a reflection on agile development practices and their impact on team collaboration and productivity.

title: Testing and Quality Lab
description: Practice writing unit tests and evaluating software quality using automated testing frameworks.

title: System Design Project
description: Design a scalable software system, focusing on architecture, trade-offs, and system components.

title: Automata and Regular Languages Homework
description: Solve problems involving finite automata, regular expressions, and language recognition.

title: Context-Free Grammar Problems
description: Analyze and construct context-free grammars and parse trees for formal languages.

title: Computability and Complexity Assignment
description: Explore computability limits and complexity classes through formal proofs and problem-solving.
